An act to amend Section 26300 of the Health and Safety Code, and to amend Sections 312.5, 405, 406, 426, 472, 672, 4020, 5030, 5031, 5032, 5033, 5034, 5035, 5036, 5037, 5038, 5039, 12500, 12509, 12509.5, 12804.9, 12814.6, 21113, 21201.3, 21203, 21207.5, 21209, 21712, 21960, 22651.08, 23103, 23135, 23330, 24015, 24951, 25650, 27800, 27802, 27803, 38012, 38366, 38505, and 38601 of, to amend the heading of Article 8.1 (commencing with Section 5030) of Chapter 1 of Division 3 of, to add Section 21065 to,
